sub_components.name: State-Specific Riders (IL, MD, MN, NY, ND, RI, SD, WA)

exhibits.name: Table of Contents - Magnuson Cloud PMS Operating Manual
exhibits.notes: 40-page manual; 8 sections: Setup, Rooms, Channel Manager, Reservations, Rates/Inventory, Payments, Reports, Support

exhibits.name: Table of Contents - Magnuson Brand Standards Manual
exhibits.notes: 12-page manual; 7 sections: Introduction, Service Standards, Building, Guest Rooms, Brand Identity, Technology, Conclusion

exhibits.name: State Agencies / Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: 13 states listed: CA, HI, IL, IN, MD, MI, MN, NY, ND, OR, RI, SD, VA, WA, WI

exhibits.name: List of Current Franchisees
exhibits.notes: 11 current franchisees as of Dec 31, 2024 across 8 states. No signed-but-not-open.

exhibits.name: List of Franchisees Who Left the System
exhibits.notes: 2 franchisees left in FY2024: 1 TX (terminated post-FY), 1 IL (terminated without opening)

exhibits.name: Representations Statement
exhibits.notes: Not to be signed by residents of registration states

exhibits.name: Sample General Release
exhibits.notes: Includes CA Section 1542 waiver, MD and WA carve-outs

exhibits.name: State Addenda
exhibits.notes: Addenda for CA, HI, IL, MD, MN, NY, ND, RI, SD, VA, WA. Fee deferral required in CA, IL, MD, MN, ND, SD, WA.

exhibits.name: Receipts
exhibits.notes: State effective dates page + dual receipt pages
